title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
